description: A customer at the end of their trial period wants to convert to a paid subscription.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the correct trial account.

nodes.task_description: Present the available paid plans and help the customer choose the right one.

expected_outcome.value: Agent helps the customer select the 'Business' plan.

nodes.task_description: Convert the trial account to a paid account, preserving all the user's data and settings, and process the first payment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully upgrades the account without data loss.
